title: ATC’14
chunk_content: title atc ’ 14 the international conference on advanced technologies for communications atc is an annual conference series co organized by the radio electronics association of vietnam rev and the ieee communications society ieee comsoc the goal of the series is twofold to foster an international forum for scientific and technological exchange among vietnamese and worldwide scientists and engineers in the fields of electronics communications and related areas and to gather their high quality research contributions started in 2008 in hanoi the conference has made a great tour across vietnam for better promoting its scientific development 2009 – haiphong 2010 – ho chi minh city 2011 – danang 2012 – hanoi 2013 – ho chi minh city we now invite you to return to hanoifor the 7th meeting – the atc rev 2014 – to be held during october 15 – 17 2014 and hosted by posts and telecommunications institute of technology ptit
author: admin

title: Thông báo tuyển dụng – Công ty Wahsis
chunk_content: title thông_báo tuyển_dụng – công_ty wahsis you will be responsible for application development while providing expertise in the full software development lifecycle from concept and design to testing job requirements – easy to adapt for work environment – fair in thinking analysis and resolving problem – understanding knowledge of software development processes capabilities of team work working independently and well organizing why you ’ ll love working here – work with enterprise product – involving to full cycle project development – will be trained and leading by expert – work with closed process development and strong collaborated from all team members years of experience kinh_nghiệm minimum education level cao_đẳng language tiếng việt salary 4 000 000 – 5 000 000 vnđ work location tp hcm 7 2 ios or android developer 1 job level experienced manager 1 years in experience job type full time part time full time permanent job descriptions – perform design software in detail follow the convention of product guideline to design and the requirement for tasks – perform coding the software based on the specification design convention guideline to coding – perform unit test integrate test for any coding tasks – perform peer review the source code design follow the convention guideline if received the request from supervisor – cooperate with other team and quality control team to fix bugs found in the task and explain the root cause for any bugs – perform build software package and write build notes follow the project plan – cooperate with relevant teams has defined on project to resolve the problems troubles relate to assigned tasks – update the work progress by required of work – perform research the technical solution and consult line manager or supervisor or other teams how to resolve doubles technology requests – perform estimate for project by request from line manager or supervisor – perform other tasks by request from line manager or supervisor job requirements – bachelor degree in information technology – high priority for candidate have experience to develop enterprise business product with ios and android platform – understand and apply design patterns and modal view controller – experience with push notification services – experience on web service integration soap rest json xml – experienced with objective c xcode ios or android sdk – you must be familiar with sqlite – your code must be clean well organized and testable why

title: Recruitment and Exhibition of ICGHIT Conf
chunk_content: title recruitment and exhibition of icghit conf recruitment and exhibition of icghit conf with young and smart vietnamese student are actively involving in helping academics and it industries in korea something better more efficient and more productively accordingly our student recruit and exhibition event is a good opportunity for both prospective vietnamese students and the employers in korea professors in research centers and ceo ’ s in it area company in korea are looking forward to find out young vietnamese students on this event they can interview each other on site to see the best student and company or university that they would fit perfectly for the job position interactive discussions are expected to be a part of the event icghit conf is seeking forward thinking young students who passionate for continual learning academic growth and are motivated by making a positive impact on the world companies who want to exhibit their products and are interested in this program are ask to conatact to us students who would like to have an interview in place please send your resume to recruit event chair prof lee ktlee kongju ac kr and professors who are looking for smart vietnamese student as the master or doctor course position send your lab information to the chair as well

chunk_content: title hội_thảo khoa_học_sinh_viên 2017 hội_thảo 10 báo_cáo chuyên_đề sinh_viên – thiết_lập bản_đồ xung_quanh sử_dụng matlab arduino – lê công tuấn nguyễn hoài nam sinh_viên ngành kỹ_thuật điện_tử truyền_thông – vẽ dữ_liệu thực cảm_biến nhiệt_độ sử_dụng arduino matlab – tống thị xuân nguyễn lê thuật sinh_viên ngành kỹ_thuật điện_tử truyền_thông – dữ_liệu dựa đếm truy_cập sử_dụng matlab – phan pha nin trương công hiếu_sinh_viên ngành kỹ_thuật điện_tử truyền_thông – robot thú cưng – võ quốc sinh_viên ngành công_nghệ kỹ_thuật điện điện_tử – thiết_kế hệ_thống điều_khiển định_hướng pin mặt_trời – huỳnh quốc khương võ trọng nghĩa trần khoa sinh_viên ngành công_nghệ kỹ_thuật điện điện_tử – nghiên_cứu ứng_dụng công_nghệ near field communication – hoàng diệu đức sinh_viên ngành công_nghệ thông_tin – chuyển_thể tác_phẩm văn_học thành hoạt_hình 2d – nguyễn thị bích sương trương nguyễn ngọc nga đỗ thái trúc sinh_viên ngành công_nghệ đa_phương_tiện – yếu_tố ảnh_hưởng rút_lui quá_trình quyết_định mua_bán sáp_nhập doanh_nghiệp – trương tuyết mi sinh_viên ngành quản_trị kinh_doanh – hành_vi tiêu_dùng dầu_gội đầu tp hồ chí minh – trịnh thị thu thảo lê ngọc vy sinh_viên ngành marketing yếu_tố tác_động mua hàng siêu_thị tp hồ chí minh – trần thị mỹ linh nguyễn thị bích trâm sinh_viên ngành marketing sinh_viên khối kỹ_thuật báo_cáo hội_thảo sinh_viên khối kinh_tế báo_cáo hội_thảo cạnh báo_cáo sinh_viên trưng_bày biểu_diễn sản_phẩm thiết_kế thu_hút quan_tâm giảng_viên sinh_viên tham_dự hội_thảo

title: Tổng Kết Đề Tài NCKH Sinh Viên Năm 2022
chunk_content: title tổng_kết đề_tài nckh sinh_viên 2022 gvhd ths nguyễn thị hương 19 trần thị thuý an trịnh hoàng phúc đặng thị thu_thanh “ nhân_tố ảnh_hưởng hành_vi sử_dụng dịch_vụ ví điện_tử momo tp hcm ” gvhd ths nguyễn trung_thành 20 lý nguyên hảo “ xây_dựng chiến_lược kinh_doanh công_ty cà_phê starbucks việt_nam ” gvhd ths lê hoàng mai 21 huỳnh võ thị thu huyền “ nghiên_cứu tác_động ảnh_hưởng mạng xã_hội influencer kol sinh_viên mua hàng quần_áo online tphcm ” gvhd ths trần quốc hùng 22 tạ thị thu huyền la dương thái thư “ đẩy_mạnh hoạt_động marketing chuỗi cửa_hàng cafe the coffee house ” gvhd ths trần thanh_trà 23 nguyễn vũ lan chi nguyễn thị phương “ nhân_tố ảnh_hưởng hành_vi mua tiêu_dùng cửa_hàng highlands tp thủ đức ” gvhd ts trương đức nga 24 nguyễn thị nga “ xây_dựng chiến_lược kinh_doanh công_ty_tnhh tmdv phúc lạc_thịnh khu_vực tp hcm ” gvhd ths trần thị khánh li 25 đoàn thị kiều_viên “ hoàn_thiện công_tác kế_toán doanh_thu chi_phí xác_định kết_quả kinh_doanh công_ty_tnhh thiết_bị công_nghiệp âu ” gvhd ths trần thị nhật hà 26 lê thị kim_ngân đỗ thị linh_chi “ xây_dựng chiến_lược kinh_doanh công_ty cổ_phần tập_đoàn hòa_phát ”

title: FDSE 2014 (LNCS – Springer Verlag)
chunk_content: title fdse 2014 lncs – springer verlag the annual international conference on future data and security engineering fdse is a premier forum designed for researchers and practitioners interested in state of the art and state of the practice activities in data information knowledge and security engineering to explore cutting edge ideas present and exchange their research results and advanced data intensive applications as well as to discuss emerging issues on data information knowledge and security engineering title fdse 2014 lncs – springer verlag we invite the submission of both original research contributions and industry papers at the annual fdse the researchers and practitioners will not only be able to share research solutions to problems of today ’ s data and security engineering society but also identify new issues and directions for future related research and development work fdse 2014 will be held in ho chi minh city vietnam from november 19 21 2014

title: eSilicon – Applications Now Open
chunk_content: title esilicon – applications now open the sunflower mission engineering technology scholarship for excellence program in collaboration with the technology industry is a program that offers grants to undergraduate students in circuit design engineering or software development related disciplines the program aims to recognize students demonstrating excellence in the fields of science technology engineering and math stem and to encourage outstanding global citizenship title esilicon – applications now open the program is managed by esilicon vietnam the scholarship program is open to vietnamese students who are completing a bachelor ’ s degree in engineering or technology from second year to final year in 2014 2015 the following qualities will be evaluated in determining the scholarship winners passion drive and career ambition in their study of engineering or other technology field in particular related to circuit design or software development academic excellence with a latest full academic year gpa score of 7 0 or above determination to set and achieve goals respect for self family and community future ability and passion to lead and assist others in vietnam and globally english language skills up to 60 scholarships will be awarded and if you possess these qualities we are very interested in receiving your scholarship application for more details on the scholarship program and to download an application form please visit our website application deadlines in order to screen all applications thoroughly we have set two deadlines for our two groups of target universities please carefully check the application deadlines applications close for da nang universities on 05 thoctober 2014 applications close for hcmc universities on 05 thoctober 2014 for more details on the scholarship program and to download an application form please visit our website
author: admin

title: ICGHIT (International Conference on Green and Human Information Technology)
chunk_content: title icghit international conference on green and human information technology icghit international conference on green and human information technology is an international conference focusing on green and information technologies oriented to humanity the goal of icghit is to form a platform to seek the advancement of green technology and human related it in various view of research title icghit international conference on green and human information technology the main topics of the conference are green it communication and ubiquitous multimedia and signal processing and control and intelligent system many papers of advanced technology will be presented and the various products of multiple companies will be exhibited we hope to provide good chances about the topics for technical exchange and advancement mutual cooperation among the participants and local development of the country in which the conference holds we believe that green technology and human it are related each other closely and are able to produce a synergy to enhance human welfare and humanity in present and future technological society a philosophy of the conference is the achievement of the dream of it that is to improve human welfare and happiness but not to threat the human characteristics and safety therefore we are going to emphasize humanity as well as technology we hope that you have chances to meet researchers interested in the same area and to be a friend with them we will make the conference more open and friendly
author: admin

chunk_content: title “ ” thăm trung_ương cục miền nam 6h00 chủ_nhật 15 02 2009 đoàn thanh_niên học_viện cơ_sở khởi_hành chuyến thăm trung_ương cục miền nam huyện tân_biên tỉnh tây ninh đoàn đi 45 đoàn_viên sinh_viên nguyễn vân bí_thư đoàn thanh_niên học_viện cơ_sở trưởng_đoàn hoạt_động giáo_dục truyền_thống đạo_đức cách_mạng sinh_viên học_viện cạnh kịp_thời động_viên ghi_nhận sinh_viên nỗ_lực hoạt_động nghiên_cứu khoa_học thi olympic sinh_viên học_tập – rèn_luyện đoàn_viên ưu_tú đóng_góp hoạt_động công_tác đoàn phong_trào sinh_viên trung_ương cục miền nam sinh_viên giới_thiệu lịch_sử thành_lập hoạt_động trung_ương cục miền nam 1961 thống_nhất đất_nước nâng tự_hào dân_tộc trận đánh oai_hùng chiến_thắng lịch_sử dân_tộc chiến_trường miền nam bấy_giờ đoàn thăm làm_việc giới_thiệu tiểu_sử hoạt_động cách_mạng đồng_chí nguyễn văn linh phạm hùng võ văn việt đại_tướng nguyễn chí lê đức thọ … đoạn đường 2 000m thăm di_tích sinh_viên hướng_dẫn giới_thiệu hoạt_động quân_đội ta tw cục giới_thiệu đường_hầm chiến_hào tình_huống lẫn quân_thù đoàn tham_quan phòng trưng_bày hình_ảnh hoạt_động cách_mạng quân ta hiện_vật đồng_chí lãnh_đạo cách_mạng kháng_chiến chống mỹ cứu chiến_trường miền nam
